comment.body: I was studying a bit yesterday how to structure such a trade. Very small size just to see how it reacts and to learn. You take mini oil future (eg MCL), choose call strike closest to ATM, sell May and buy August expiry. If I am not mistaken vega is highest ATM, hence ATM strike. Due to current turmoil short term maturity has very high vega, the long leg is to hedge. If I understood correctly Alma sold several contracts short against one long leg making it riskier if vega goes even higher. This is the speculative part. Happy to be corrected if I got something wrong.
